sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
Celebrate the bond of love, strength, and prosperity with our handcrafted Elephant & Baby Elephant Miniature, beautifully embedded with natural Green Aventurine crystal chips. Known as the Crystal of Opportunity, Green Aventurine attracts abundance, growth, and good fortune — making this duo a perfect symbol of harmony and positivity.

Each piece is delicately crafted in terrazzo-style with genuine crystal inlays, representing wisdom, protection, and nurturing energy. This adorable pair embodies both strength and tenderness — a timeless reminder of family, stability, and success.

Size: Elephant- 4.8 × 4.3 cm (Height × Width)
Baby Elephant- 1.9 × 1.4 cm
Weight in Grams- 275.73

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
🐘 Elephant: Symbol of wisdom, power & good luck

🐘 Baby Elephant: Represents love, protection & new beginnings

💚 Green Aventurine: Enhances prosperity, optimism & emotional balance

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text: It is carefully handcrafted by skilled artisans, setting each natural aventurine crystal into a polished metal frame. Every piece is shaped and finished with precision to ensure lasting beauty and spiritual energy.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Place this set in your living room, workspace, or meditation corner to attract positive vibrations and prosperity. It also makes a thoughtful gift for housewarmings, new ventures, or loved ones seeking growth and balance.
